programme.desc: When their peaceful town is ravaged by a zombie invasion, three scouts and one badass cocktail waitress will fight for the badge of a lifetime and put their scouting skills to the test to save mankind from the undead.

programme.title: Hex, (2022, Teen Screams)
programme.desc: Following a mysterious disappearance on a jump, a group of skydivers experience paranormal occurrences that leave them fighting for their lives.

programme.title: Winnie-the-Pooh: Blood and Honey, (2022, Cult Horror)
programme.desc: Winnie-The-Pooh: Blood and Honey follows Pooh and Piglet as they go on a rampage after Christopher Robin abandons them.

programme.title: My Bloody Valentine, (2009, Slashers and Serial Killers)
programme.desc: A remake of George Mihalka's 1981 classic slasher film, MY BLOODY VALENTINE takes place ten years after a devastating coal mining accident when a string of gruesome murders plagues a town.

programme.title: Cobweb, (2023, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: Peter confides in his parents (Lizzy Caplan, Antony Starr) about mysterious tapping in his bedroom wall, but they say it’s just an old house. As his fear grows, so do his doubts.

programme.title: 1BR, (2020, Thriller)
programme.desc: After leaving behind a painful past, Sarah scores the perfect Hollywood apartment only to discover that her surprisingly welcoming neighbors may harbor a dangerous secret.

programme.title: Crawl, (2019, Creature Features)
programme.desc: As a hurricane tears through Florida, Haley rushes to find her father, who is injured and trapped in the crawl space of their home. With the storm intensifying and water levels rising, the pair face an even bigger threat lurking below the surface.

programme.title: My Bloody Valentine, (2009, Slashers and Serial Killers)

programme.title: Gremlins, (1984, Comedy)
programme.desc: The rules for a Mogwai are simple: Keep your Mogwai away from water, bright lights and, most importantly, never feed him after midnight. But in Kingston Falls the rules are broken, and the consequences multiply at an alarming rate.

programme.title: Ghoulies, (1985, Supernatural Horror)

programme.title: Dolls, (1986, Cult Horror)
programme.desc: The Hartwicke's vast collection of dolls is fun to play with and nice to look at, but beneath the painted faces of their lifelike dolls lie murderous creatures with a vengeance for blood!

programme.title: The Godfather, (1972, Crime)
programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II, (1974, Crime)
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: Mario Puzo's The Godfather Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone, (2020, Crime)
programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.title: The Godfather, (1972, Crime)

programme.title: In & Out, (1997, Comedy)
programme.desc: A former student who's now an actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay. He's outed when he didn't know he was in! Kevin Kline plays Howard, scrambling to go forth with his wedding and doing his best to assert his manliness.

programme.title: Kinky Boots, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: To save his family's shoe business from imminent bankruptcy, young Charlie Price turns to an unlikely new creative consultant: a fabulous drag queen whose creative style and wild designs are a breath of fresh air in the stuffy old factory.

programme.title: Dicks: The Musical, (2023, Musical)
programme.desc: Two self-obsessed businessmen discover they're identical twins and plot to reunite their eccentric divorced parents. A riotously funny and debaucherous musical starring Megan Thee Stallion, Nathan Lane, Megan Mullally, and Bowen Yang.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet, (1993, Drama)
programme.desc: A Chinese Yuppie living in New York who decides that a marriage of convenience is the perfect way to prevent his parents back in Taiwan from discovering he is gay. But his plan backfires when his parents insist on coming to New York for the wedding.

programme.title: Eat Drink Man Woman, (1994, Foreign Comedies)
programme.desc: A delicious comedy about food, fatherhood and family ties. Widower Tao Chu, Taiwan's most famous chef, struggles with accepting his three daughters' appetite for boys, an interest that begins to break the family apart with hilarious and touching results.

programme.title: Weekend, (2011, Drama)
programme.desc: A drunken one-night stand turns into a deeper romance over the course of a booze, drug and sex filled weekend.

programme.desc: A former student who's now an actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay. He's outed when he didn't know he was in! Kevin Kline plays Howard, scrambling to go forth with his wedding and doing his best to assert his manliness.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding, (1997, Romance)
programme.desc: Commitment-shy Jules Potter reluctantly realizes she is in love with her best friend Michael. There is just one catch: he's about to marry someone else. Jules will do anything to steal him back... except tell him the simple truth.

programme.title: Election, (1999, Political Comedies)
programme.desc: Reese Witherspoon plays Tracy Flick, a straight-A go-getter determined to be president of Carver High’s student body. Popular teacher Jim McAllister (Broderick) decides to derail Tracy’s obsessive overachieving by recruiting an opposition candidate.

programme.title: John Grisham's The Rainmaker, (1997, Thriller)
programme.desc: Matt Damon plays Rudy Baylor, a rookie lawyer in over his head on a high-profile case. Opposing him: an army of legal sharks. On Rudy’s side: Deck Shifflet, a feisty “paralawyer” who specializes in flunking the bar exam.

programme.title: Girl, Interrupted, (1999, Biographical Drama)
programme.desc: Winona Ryder and Academy Award(r)-winner Angelina Jolie are the certifiable stars of Claymoore Hospital's South Bell ward in this wry adaptation of Susanna Kaysen's best-selling memoir.

programme.title: Grease, (1978, Musical)
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: Grease 2, (1982, Musical)
programme.desc: Return to rockin’ Rydell High for a whole new term! It’s 1961, two years after the original "Grease" gang graduated, and there’s a new crop of seniors – and new members of the coolest cliques on campus.

programme.title: Up in Smoke, (1978, Comedy)
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail, (1975, Comedy)
programme.desc: Grossing the highest box-office of any British film in the US when released in 1975, this "cult classic" comedy from the Monty Python team loosely follows the legend of King Arthur, along with his squire and his Knights of the Round Table.

programme.title: Grease, (1978, Musical)
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: Bananas, (1971, Screwball)
programme.desc: Woody Allen's humor is at his wild and bizarre best in this story of a "weird-gadget" tester who, after being jilted by his girlfriend (Louise Lasser), ends up as president of a tiny country where absurdity reigns.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik transforms The Winged Dragon of Ra into its powerful form, the Egyptian God Phoenix! If Joey can't withstand the Phoenix's blazing fire, he'll lose the duel... plus his only chance to save Mai from her mental prison!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the rematch we've all been waiting for! Yugi and Kaiba square off for the first time since Duelist Kingdom in front of thousands of ravenous fans for the right to challenge Marik! It's time to duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba has all the monsters necessary to summon Obelisk the Tormentor to finish Yugi off! Though overwhelmed and outmatched, nothing is going to stop Yugi from trying to summon his Egyptian God first!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon clashes against Kaiba's Obelisk the Tormentor, what will happen when two Egyptian Gods fight each other? It's time to find out which Egyptian God is truly stronger!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The clash of the two Egyptian God Monsters releases mystical energies that show Yugi and Kaiba visions of the ancient Egyptian past! What new answers do these images unlock, and what prophecies do they make for the future?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons three powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragons, but Yugi has no monsters remaining in his deck! Is losing only a matter of time, or will a long-dormant card from a fallen friend help turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba not only controls Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, but his Final Attack Orders card leaves Yugi with only three cards in his deck! If Yugi loses, he'll have to give up his chance to save the world from Marik's evil!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tired of Kaiba's insults, Joey challenges Kaiba for third place in the Battle City Tournament! Has Joey mastered enough strategies to take down the top dog, or is Kaiba going to wallop Joey like a pathetic puppy?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba attacks with his mighty Blue-Eyes White Dragon, but Joey has no monsters to defend with! Joey's luck has run out, so it's time for him to rely on skill!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey and Kaiba's battle reaches its roaring climax! Will Joey take down his biggest headache and actually teach Kaiba a thing or two about being a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the critical Battle City showdown with the fate of the world at stake: Yami Yugi vs. Marik! If Yami Yugi loses, Yugi is taking a permanent vacation into the Shadow Realm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik proves his The Winged Dragon of Ra is the strongest Egyptian God Card by destroying Slifer the Sky Dragon! None of Yugi's cards can withstand its assault, but a gift from Kaiba may turn the duel around…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi can't strike Marik's life points, and with every turn that passes, Marik is one step closer to taking down Yugi with a final strike from The Winged Dragon of Ra...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Yugi at the end of his ropes and the maniacal Marik waging all-out war, can Marik's oldest friend reach Marik in time to help him come to his senses before his insanity overwhelms him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Will the combined force of all of Yugi's monsters be enough to defeat an Egyptian God that terminated two other powerful Egyptian Gods? The fate of the world hangs in the balance with the finale of the Battle City Tournament!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: KaibaCorp Island is set to explode in mere minutes, but the blimp's engines are offline! Can Yugi and friends escape from the island in time, or will they sink to the bottom of the sea?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa and Serenity tour around the Town of Domino and reminisce about their friends' battles during Battle City, they learn how much they've grown and far they've come... and how far they have left to go!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian God Cards are stolen! A terrifying new villain emerges! Real monsters begin to appear around the world! Can Yugi and the gang discover how these strange events are connected before the planet is destroyed?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Seal of Orichalcos, not only can Gurimo have ten monsters at once, but each creature receives a power boost from Orichalcos's malevolent energies! Yugi better find a way to protect himself against Gurimo's horde!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only is our world on the brink of apocalypse, but an entire domain of monsters is also on the verge of collapse! Both Earth and the monster domain must unite and fight against the largest terror they have ever faced!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the gang set off on a cross-country trek when they're asked for help from a one-eyed former foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba returns to Duelist Kingdom for a showdown against Pegasus! Will Kaiba discover the secret behind Pegasus's strategies before he loses his soul, just like he did on his first trip to Duelist Kingdom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only does Alister's fiend gain attack points for every fiery monster on the field, but it can also take control of Kaiba's monsters! Will Alister get his revenge, or will Kaiba get aid from the monster domain?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai's back to help Yugi take down Dartz and save the world from annihilation... or is a topsy-turvy twist in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has joined the enemy! Is she brainwashed, or is there some deeper reason for her unexpected transformation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Taking advantage of the Seal of Orichalcos, Mai coordinates her Harpie Ladies to whittle Joey's forces into waste! Is this the last we'll see of him, or will a legendary guardian recognize Joey as a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the potent powers of Claw of Hermos, Joey transforms Time Wizard into an almighty... hammer? Can Joey master the uncanny abilities of his new card to pound Mai's Harpie Ladies before they slash him to shreds?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Professor Hawkins has discovered startling connections between the world's conundrums, the Orichalcos stones and an ancient lost civilization.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a Wild West showdown between Yugi and his fiercest challenge yet: Rafael and his guardian monsters.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi calls on the legendary strength of Timaeus, but when it's not enough to crack Rafael's defense, will Yugi resort to desperate measures and go against everything he believes in to make the riskiest move of his life?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Using the abilities of Seal of Orichalcos, Yugi grinds Rafael's guardians, but he's also succumbing to the card's evil influence. As darkness grows within his heart, the consequences of his non-heroic acts may be his undoing.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Dartz has captured Yugi's soul! Broken and unmotivated, how will our heroes ever rescue Yugi, especially when Dartz has a duo of nefarious new recruits ready to eradicate them?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: A cross-country expedition turns tragic when Dartz's new duelists separate Yugi from Joey in order to capture their souls separately.

programme.title: Luffy makes friends with a Centaur, Franky uses a cola-powered laser to break out of the clink, and Sanji takes a chance on a body-less Samurai!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Startling! The Secret of the Island Is Finally Revealed!

programme.title: Nami's soft spot for children prompts her to call off the escape and declare war on anyone who makes a kid cry. Meanwhile, Luffy and the gang take a banana boat to the icy side of the island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Save the Children! The Straw Hats Start to Fight!

programme.title: Luffy's group finds themselves up against a gang of centaurs, Brook battles the torso of a surly samurai, and Captain Smoker encounters someone highly unexpected!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Swordplay Showdown! Brook vs. the Mysterious Torso Samurai!

programme.title: Nami and Chopper seek a safe exit for the children, Luffy's group hopes to avoid a perilous plunge into icy waters, and Captain Smoker faces off against Trafalgar Law!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy's group takes a deadly plunge into icy waters, and Trafalgar Law uses his unique abilities to rearrange Nami's group and cast our heroes into chaotic confusion!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: In a Real Pinch! Luffy Sinks into the Ice-Cold Lake!

programme.title: While Luffy and his mates race toward a reunion, Admiral Smoker struggles to survive a heart-stopping showdown with Trafalgar Law!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Collision! Law vs. Vice Admiral Smoker!

programme.title: Luffy is excited to once again cross paths with Trafalgar Law, but a reunion with his mixed up crew – and the loss of his extra legs – quickly dampens the captain's enthusiasm!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Meeting Again After Two Years! Luffy and Law!

programme.title: While Captain Smoker determines his next move, a very large pirate with alligator legs tells Luffy and the Straw Hats the true story of Punk Hazard's mysterious transformation!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Worst in the World! A Scientist of Terror - Caesar!

programme.title: In the aftermath of Toriko, Luffy, and Goku's three-way tie in the World's Best Eating Competition, the festivities are interrupted by the sudden appearance of a monster that threatens to consume every living thing on earth.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: History’s Strongest Collaboration vs. Glutton of the Sea

programme.title: The giant children fly into a mysterious rage, and Chopper discovers the true reason for their unusual condition! Meanwhile, Zoro, Brook, and Sanji cross paths with a dangerous duo!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Chopper's Fury! The Master's Inhumane Experiment!

programme.title: The story of how Trafalgar Law arrived at Punk Hazard is revealed, and the Yeti Cool Brothers set their sights on a showdown with the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: To Annihilate the Straw Hats! Legendary Assassins Descend!

programme.title: Luffy tries to chase down the Yetti Cool Brothers, but Franky – still trapped in Chopper's Body – makes his mission extremely difficult. Just when all appears lost, an unexpected ally lends a hand!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Save Nami! Luffy's Fight on the Snow-Capped Mountains!

programme.title: Luffy agrees to an alliance with Trafalgar Law, but the Straw Hats refuse to leave the island until the children are safe. Meanwhile, the gaseous master unleashes something very deadly!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Formed! Luffy and Law's Pirate Alliance!

programme.title: Zoro, Sanji, and Brook continue their search for the samurai, Trafalgar tries to sneak Chopper into the laboratory, and Luffy boldly challenges the Master!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Capture M! The Pirate Alliance's Operation Launches!

programme.title: Luffy's battle with his old nemesis Smoker is interrupted by the arrival of a terrifying toxic blob – and the evil genius who created the monster!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: On the Verge of Annihilation! A Deadly Monster Comes Flying In!

programme.title: The Straw Hats make a valiant push to capture Caesar Clown - Luffy matches his Armament Haki with Clown's powerful Gas-Gas Fruit powers! The battle turns in favor of the Straw Hats, but underestimating Clown's abilities may have deadly consequences!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: An Intense Battle! Caesar Exercises His True Power!

programme.title: Trafalgar Law finds trouble in the form of an old acquaintance, Chopper investigates the Master's lab, and the mysterious Samurai shows what he can do with a full body!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Samurai Who Can Cut Fire! Foxfire Kin'emon!

programme.title: The Master gathers his young test subjects, shocking secret identities are finally revealed, and the poisonous purple blob continues its march across the island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Shocking! The True Identity of the Mystery Man Vergo!

programme.title: Nami and Usopp get an unexpected helping hand in their fight to save the children, Chopper plots a daring escape attempt, and the Master markets his greatest weapon!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Save the Children! The Master's Evil Hands Close In!

programme.title: A desperate need for candy leads the children to return to the lab, and Caesar plans to show the world the new and improved version of Smiley!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Shaking Up the New World! Caesar's Horrendous Experiment!

programme.title: Luffy and the Straw Hats find themselves pursued by a deadly cloud of purple gas that turns everything living thing in its path into petrified statues of ash!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Deadliest Weapon of Mass Destruction in History! Shinokuni!

programme.title: Law's got a trick up his sleeve that could mean the difference between life and death. Zoro and company reunite with Nami and Sanji, but can they reach safety before being swallowed by a poisonous cloud?!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Launching the Counter Attack! Luffy and Law’s Great Escape!

programme.title: Finally reunited and returned to their proper bodies, the Straw Hats fall in line as Luffy and Law lead the charge to settle the score with Caesar – and save the children!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Get to Building R! The Pirate Alliance's Great Advance

programme.title: Caesar hatches a plan to forever silence his enemies, Chopper races through the compound in search of the drugged children, and Tashigi's men make the ultimate sacrifice!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Tashigi's Tears! G-5's Desperate Breakthrough Plan!

programme.title: Luffy races toward Caesar in the hopes of delivering a beating, Sanji saves a damsel in distress, and Chopper tries to prevent the children from eating the drugged candy!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Treacherous Vice Admiral! Demon Bamboo Vergo!

programme.title: Sanji and Vergo slug it out in a cloud of toxic gas, Law finds the room that could ruin the New World, and Luffy hopes to bring Caesar's reign of terror to a brutal end!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Fierce Battle Gets Heated! Luffy vs. Caesar!

programme.title: With Law's true ambitions revealed, Doflamingo goes into action in order to protect his criminal operation! Caesar slips away from Luffy leaving him to face off with the frigid Monet, and the rest of the crew face down a menacing dragon!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Mastermind Underground! Doflamingo Makes His Move!

programme.title: Luffy goes down fast after Monet puts a chill into him, and Trafalgar Law makes a desperate attempt to reclaim his heart during an electric battle with Vergo!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy Dies from Exposure?! The Spine-chilling Snow Woman Monet!

programme.title: Smoker attacks Vergo for assaulting his men, Luffy meets something strange in the trash heap, and a flashback reveals the true depths of Caesar's madness!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fists Collide! A Battle of the Two Vice Admirals!

programme.title: Luffy befriends a dragon that used to be a human boy, and Captain Smoker continues his brutal battle with the villainous Vergo!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy hitches a ride on a dragon, Mocha tries to keep the Master's candy away from her friends, and Zoro pits his steel against snow in a battle with Monet!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Deadly Fight in a Blizzard! The Straw Hats vs. the Snow Woman!

programme.title: It's Zoro vs. Monet in a duel to the death - or is it? Tashigi comes to lend a hand, and she'll need to bring her full might to compensate for Zoro's weakness! Meanwhile, Mocha is running out of options for keeping the candy away from the children.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Showing Off His Techniques! Zoro's Formidable One-Sword Style!

programme.title: Chopper, Nami, and Robin watch in horror as Mocha makes a heartbreaking sacrifice in a courageous attempt to save the lives of her friends!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: To Save Her Friends! Mocha Runs at the Risk of Her Life!

programme.title: Face/Off, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: As a result of a new medical technique, an agent is able to surgically take on the identical appearance of a criminal in order to take down his terrorist organization.

programme.title: Gemini Man, (2019, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Will Smith stars in the nonstop action thrill-ride from Academy Award®-winning director Ang Lee. Retired hitman (Smith) is forced on the run and finds himself hunted by his ultimate adversary - a younger clone of himself.

programme.title: Salt, (2010, Action)
programme.desc: Evelyn Salt swore an oath to duty, honor, and country. She will prove loyal to these when a defector accuses her of being a Russian sleeper spy. Salt goes on the run, using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative to elude capture.

programme.title: Snowpiercer, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: After a failed global-warming experiment, a post-apocalyptic Ice Age has killed off nearly all life on the planet.

programme.title: Face/Off, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: As a result of a new medical technique, an agent is able to surgically take on the identical appearance of a criminal in order to take down his terrorist organization.

programme.title: Gemini Man, (2019, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Will Smith stars in the nonstop action thrill-ride from Academy Award®-winning director Ang Lee. Retired hitman (Smith) is forced on the run and finds himself hunted by his ultimate adversary - a younger clone of himself.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Continuing his crusade to punish violent criminals in America, former FBI agent Frank Castle arrives in New York to take on a scarred villain who plots to take control of the underworld.

programme.title: Gunfight At The O.K. Corral, (1957, Western)
programme.desc: Frontier lawman Wyatt Earp joins his three brothers in their feud against the villainous Clanton gang, a local clan of cattle thieves in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Stagecoach, (1939, Western)
programme.desc: Dallas is a woman with a past who has been driven out of town by the high-minded ladies of the community. Lucy Mallory is the wife of a cavalry officer stationed in Lordsburg, and she's determined to be with him.

programme.title: The Alamo, (1960, War)
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Cowboy Serenade, (1942, Western)
programme.desc: When a young man is sent to sell cattle to a packing plant, he is soon swindled by card sharks. Gene Autry is sent to investigate and recover the cattle, find the young man, and clear his name.

programme.title: Heart Of The Rio Grande, (1942, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry tames a spoiled teenage shrew sent to a Dude Ranch for the summer and in the process humanizes her father into being a better parent. Action includes stampeding horses, and a bold rescue!

programme.title: Home in Wyomin', (1942, Western)
programme.desc: Radio star Gene Autry must solve a murder mystery at the Frontier Days pageant in Wyoming that involves a newspaper photographer, Chicago gangsters, a deserted mine, and a surprise ending.

programme.title: John Sturges' The Hallelujah Trail, (1965, Western)
programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.title: The Way West, (1967, Western)
programme.desc: Icons Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum and Richard Widmark star in this sumptuous, epic tale of the brave men and women in the U.S. who left the comfort and safety of life in the East for the promise of free land a better life in the untamed West.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo, (1966, Western)
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: Zack and Miri Make a Porno, (2008, Screwball)
programme.desc: In order to resolve their financial woes, lifelong platonic friends Zack and Miri decide to produce a porno film.

programme.title: Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story, (2007, Comedy)
programme.desc: Dewey Cox had it all: the women (over 411), the friends (Elvis) and the rock 'n' roll lifestyle (every pill and powder). But most of all, he had the music that transformed a dimwitted country boy into the greatest American rock star who never lived.

programme.title: Eurotrip, (2004, Screwball)
programme.desc: Europe will never be the same again after Scotty Thomas and his buddies take off for the express to excess! They're hooking up with hot strangers and jamming all the extreme insanity they can into the wildest trip of their lives!

programme.title: Sex Drive, (2008, Late Night Comedies)
programme.desc: When an online hottie offers to help him become a man, Ian embarks on a wild road trip to a sure thing.

programme.title: Old School, (2003, Screwball)
programme.desc: Three men are disenchanted with life and try to recapture their college days.

programme.title: Eurotrip, (2004, Screwball)
programme.desc: Europe will never be the same again after Scotty Thomas and his buddies take off for the express to excess! They're hooking up with hot strangers and jamming all the extreme insanity they can into the wildest trip of their lives!

programme.title: Bart Got a Room, (2009, Screwball)
programme.desc: While Danny's father and mother independently search for love, Danny is on his own desperate quest to find a prom date.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians fight their way through to find Hotaru, who is in possession of Chibi-Usa’s Silver Crystal.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: The Three Outer Guardians risk their lives to contain Master Pharaoh 90 within the Sankakusu Delta and halt his attempt to become one with the Earth.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: As Master Pharaoh 90’s power continues to grow, to protect her friends Super Sailor Moon decides to make the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: With Super Sailor Moon gone, the remaining Sailor Guardians must helplessly watch as Sailor Saturn brings an end to the world with her Silence Glaive.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi Tsukino is clumsy at times and a bit of a crybaby. Luna, a black cat with a crescent moon on her forehead, gives Usagi a miracle brooch.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi becomes close with Ami Mizuno, a genius with an IQ of 300. But there's something odd about the students at Ami's seminar.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Disturbing rumors about a certain bus swirl all around Usagi. Amid the rumors, Usagi meets a beautiful shrine maiden with black hair named Rei Hino.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi learns of a secret treasure exhibit and, suspecting it might be the 'Legendary Silver Crystal,' sneaks into the embassy of Kingdom D.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: All of Juban Middle School is talking about the 'cursed bridal shop,' where every man who visits is said to disappear.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Tuxedo Mask is reported to have committed many crimes to obtain the 'Legendary Silver Crystal,' but Usagi doesn't believe it…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi learns Tuxedo Mask's identity is actually Mamoru Chiba. Meanwhile, brainwashed people in Usagi's town wander around looking for Sailor Moon.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: The one who saved Sailor Moon was actually Sailor V. Sailor V aka Minako Aino heads to the Tokyo Tower to settle things with Kunzite but…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: While trying to protect Sailor Moon, Tuxedo Mask loses consciousness. Out of sorrow, Sailor Moon awakens as Princess Serenity.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi Tsukino is a schoolgirl who meets a talking cat named Luna. Usagi is transformed into Sailor Moon, the guardian who fights for love and justice.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A house of fortune opens up and gains popularity for its predictions. The customers begin to act violent. Usagi and Luna decide to investigate.
programme.sub-title: Punishment Awaits: The House Of Fortune Is The Monster Mansion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls in town are tuning in to a radio program that reads out love letters. A sleeping sickness is plaguing the town that puts people to sleep.
programme.sub-title: The Mysterious Sleeping Sickness: Protect the Girls In Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi is shocked to find out that she’s gained weight from too much eating. Determined to get back into shape, Usagi and her friends join a gym.
programme.sub-title: Learn How to Be Skinny from Usagi

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Shingo brings home a pet Chanela. Shingo becomes so absorbed in the Chanela that he stops going to school, which worries Usagi.
programme.sub-title: Scent of a Monster: Chanela Will Steal Your Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi bumps into Yusuke Amade, a famous musician who claims he is being chased by a monster. Usagi and Luna decide to keep an eye on Yusuke.
programme.sub-title: Protect the Melody of Love: Usagi Plays Cupid

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Naru dream of becoming famous like Mikan Shiratori. When the girls hear that Mikan is hosting a talent contest, they see their chance.
programme.sub-title: Usagi Learns Her Lesson: Becoming a Star Is Hard Work

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi befriends Ami Mizuno, the school’s smartest girl. But Luna, who senses an unknown energy coming from Ami, suspects her of being a Monster.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Genius Is a Monster: The Brainwashing Cram School of Horror

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Ami find a clock that resembles Luna. That night, the clock emits a strange light that causes Usagi to become very impatient.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Disaster: Beware of the Clock of Confusion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: People who take the bus near the Hikawa Shrine have started to go missing. Usagi and her friends decide to investigate.
programme.sub-title: The Cursed Bus: Enter Mars, the Guardian of Fire

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians go to the amusement park where visitors have gone missing. But Usagi is more focused on playing than finding the missing people.
programme.sub-title: Usagi vs. Rei: Nightmare in Dream Land

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rei goes off on a luxury cruise with Ami after winning tickets through the local lottery. Feeling left behind, Usagi sneaks aboard the ship.
programme.sub-title: I Want a Boyfriend: The Luxury Cruise Ship is a Trap

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Jadeite is given a warning by Queen Beryl, who can no longer tolerate the general’s failures. Jadeite challenges the Sailor Guardians to a showdown.
programme.sub-title: Girls Unite: The End of Jadeite

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rui is a talented tennis player but Naru has noticed a dark change in her. Worried about their classmate, Naru and Usagi go to investigate.
programme.sub-title: A New Enemy Appears: Nephrite's Evil Crest

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami brings Usagi and Rei to her favorite park. Rei decides to have a date with Mamoru at the park before it closes down.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Juban District is having a contest to decide who can design the best wedding dress. Usagi, Rei, and all the girls in town compete.
programme.sub-title: A Girl's Dream: Usagi Becomes a Bride

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A photographer named Kijin Shinokawa holds a modeling contest. All the girls who have entered begin disappearing after Shinokawa photographs them!
programme.sub-title: Usagi's a Model: The Flash of the Monster Camera

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Shingo’s friend Mika gives him a doll but Shingo unintentionally breaks the doll and hurts Mika’s feelings. Shingo decides to apologize.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi receives a love letter from Tuxedo Mask, stating that he’d like to meet her. She finds out that all the girls in town received the same letter.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Joy: A Love Letter from Tuxedo Mask

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls search for a vacation spot so they can focus on training. Instead, they settle on a mansion that has a very eerie service staff.
programme.sub-title: The Summer, the Beach, Youth and Ghosts

programme.title: Crypto, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A Wall Street banker connects a small-town art gallery to a global conspiracy, putting his own family in grave danger.

programme.title: King of Thieves, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: When a vindictive bandit threatens the peace of a flourishing kingdom, the native mystical and worldly forces must come together to save the day.

programme.title: Killshot, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A veteran assassin (Mickey Rourke) and his young partner (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) pursue a couple (Diane Lane, Thomas Jane) who stumbled upon an extortion scheme and entered the Witness Protection Program.

programme.desc: FBI agents (Christopher Meloni, Dave Bautista) uncover a conspiracy while trying to nail a group of deadly bank robbers.

programme.desc: After a familiar girl goes missing, two detectives race against time before a serial killer claims her as his next victim.

programme.title: Anjos da Noite, (2003)

Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Kate Beckinsale, Scott Speedman, Michael Sheen Diretor: Len Wiseman

programme.title: Linha de Ação, (2013)

Apesar de suas antigas discordâncias, ele aceita a tarefa, mas logo descobre as reais intenções por trás da investigação encomendada. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Catherine Zeta-Jones, Mark Wahlberg, Russell Crowe Diretor: Allen Hughes

programme.title: O Suspeito da Rua Arlington, (1999)
programme.desc: 1999. Professor de história faz amizade com seus novos vizinhos, logo após ter salvado o filho deles. Desconfiado de que há algo, começa a achar que seus vizinhos têm um plano para explodir um prédio público e que são, na verdade, terroristas. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Jeff Bridges, Tim Robbins, Joan Cusack, Hope Davis, Robert Gossett, Mason Gamble, Spencer Treat Clark, Stanley Anderson, Viviane Vives, Lee Stringer Diretor: Mark Pellington

programme.title: Dose dupla, (2013)

programme.title: Risco Absoluto, (2010)

programme.title: Centurião, (2010)

programme.title: Ruas Em Guerra, (2019)

programme.title: Guerra ao Terror, (2008)

Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Renner, Jeremy, Mackie, Anthony, Gerarghty, Brian, Jeremy Renner, Anthony Mackie, Brian Geraghty, Guy Pearce Diretor: Kathryn Bigelow

programme.title: Carga Explosiva 3, (2008)
programme.desc: 2008. programme.title: Arn - O Cavaleiro Templário, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Arn foi criado para ser um monge e um bravo guerreiro. Ao deixar sua terra, em meio à guerra entre cristãos e muçulmanos, ele conhece Cecília e se apaixona, porém, Arn é enviado para lutar na Terra Santa como um cavaleiro templário. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Os Punhos do Dragão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Tang How-Yuen, um lutador habilidoso, busca recuperar sua honra ao vingar a morte de seu mestre, que foi morto por um mestre rival. Três anos após a tragédia, sua viúva e filho juntam-se a Tang para procurar o assassino. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Colônia, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A era glacial força um grupo de sobreviventes a viver em um mundo subterrâneo, e agora eles devem lutar para preservar a humanidade contra algo mais selvagem do que a natureza. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Crime e Desejo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Agente do FBI chega a uma pequena cidade para investigar série de roubos a banco. Ele logo se aproxima de uma jovem viciada para obter informações, mas acaba se envolvendo com ela e vive um caso perigoso. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Xeque-Mate, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um caso de identidade trocada coloca Slevin no meio de uma guerra entre dois rivais de Nova York: Rabino e Chefe, os senhores do crime. Sob o olhar atento de um detetive e do assassino Goodkat, Slevin precisa elaborar um plano para salvar a sua pele. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Servos de Guerra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Dois policiais investigam o assassinato de um respeitado médico, especialista em transplante de medula óssea. Sem querer, eles desvendam um complicado caso de corrupção, comércio de órgãos humanos e venda de informações de DNA. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Max Steel, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Max é um adolescente de 16 anos que está passando por um período de descobertas. Entretanto, as transformações na vida do jovem estão relacionadas aos incríveis poderes que ele descobre ter quando entra em contato com uma força extraterrestre. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Três Ladrões e um Bebê, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata como a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestram BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Alex Rider Contra o Tempo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Alex Rider, adolescente britânico habilidoso em linguística, mergulho, artes marciais e tiro, é recrutado pelo MI6. Sua primeira missão é investigar o bilionário Darrius Sayle, que fez suspeitas doações de megacomputadores às escolas da Inglaterra. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: José e Maria, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 30ª C., Herodes reinava sobre Israel até que os rumores do nascimento do Messias ameaçavam a sua soberania. Surgem então Maria e José, os escolhidos por Deus para cuidar daquele que salvaria a humanidade, Jesus. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Em Defesa de Cristo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um jornalista investigativo, ateu convicto, parte em uma investida para desmentir a existência de Deus após sua esposa tornar-se cristã. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Apostando Alto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Assim que Ella conhece Abel, sua vida, até então regrada, muda. Com esse amante que ela não consegue decifrar bem, a jovem descobre a Paris cosmopolita e subterrânea dos círculos do jogo, onde a adrenalina e o dinheiro reinam. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Evidências de um Crime, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O policial Tom Cutler abandonou a profissão depois da morte da mulher para se concentrar em criar a filha Rose. Ele sobrevive limpando cenas de crime, mas um trabalho rotineiro acaba ameaçando a vida estável que construiu para si próprio e a filha. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.desc: 2019. Em um planeta muito além da galáxia, Ultraman X e Ultraman geed são atacados por dois misteriosos guerreiros das trevas. programme.title: Conflitos e Reencontros, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um acidente em uma mina de carvão de uma pequena cidade deixa apenas um sobrevivente e a população devastada. Porém, quando o filho adolescente de um executivo da mineradora desaparece, as consequências da tragédia inicial ganham uma nova proporção. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: De Amor e Trevas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A vida de um garoto que cresce durante a guerra em Jerusalém. Aos doze anos, sua mãe comete suicídio, mudando a vida da família para sempre. Após a tragédia, ele começa a trabalhar como escritor, participando ativamente da vida política do país. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.desc: 1970. O mundo que nos rodeia contém muitos sistemas complexos que funcionam perfeitamente juntos. Durante muitos anos, houve um debate acalorado entre evolução e criação, com a questão central de tudo: a Terra foi criada ou surgiu por conta própria. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.desc: 1970. Passageiros de um navio de cruzeiro lutam para sobreviver ao ataque de um tubarão de três cabeças. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.desc: 1970. Em uma cidade industrial vitoriana a filosofia de mercado predomina sobre a sensibilidade humana e os sentimentos verdadeiros são reprimidos. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.desc: 1970. A festa para Georgina acaba sendo um fiasco; Doroteo se sente enganado e começa a questioná-la com raiva; Francisco, com cinismo, culpa Georgina por tudo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Doroteo fica arrasado com o que aconteceu na festa de Francisco, onde descobriu toda a verdade sobre ele e Gina. Decide esquecer Georgina para sempre. Ela conversa com Elena sobre isso. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Rodrigo vai até a casa de Matilda pedir desculpas pelo que aconteceu com Gerardo; Brela o perdoa, mas não confia mais nele. Fica incomodada com a aproximação entre os dois. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Aidé descobre que Rodrigo andou visitando Matilda, por meio de Armando. Ele conta que os dois estão se reaproximando; Remédios tem uma crise de ciúmes com Gabito. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Magal e os Formigas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. João é um aposentado que está chateado com a vida. Viciado em loterias, ele nunca conseguiu ganhar dinheiro com isso. Um dia, porém, ele começa a receber visitas sobrenaturais do cantor Sidney Magal. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Três Ladrões e um Bebê, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata como a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestram BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Endgame - Roubo de Identidade, (1970)

programme.title: Guerra Biológica, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Wesley McLaren é um imunologista aposentado da CIA, que leva uma vida tranquila com sua filha em uma fazenda em Montana. Quando uma arma biológica é acionada espalhando um vírus letal, ele se vê forçado a criar uma vacina. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Jantar, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. À medida que dois casais jantam em um restaurante sofisticado, seus discursos educados disfarçam que eles estão lutando com questões familiares importantes. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Garota em Chamas - Rebelião, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ela perdeu a memória ainda jovem, mas essas lembranças escondem segredos sombrios. Gêneros: Drama

programme.desc: 1970. Um jovem delinquente do ensino médio é obrigado a ser o tutor de uma escola de baixa renda. Lá, ele se apaixona pela filha do pastor e vive uma paixão cheia de diferenças e surpresas. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Garoto Formiga 2 - A Vingança da Fúria Vermelha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após vencer a sua primeira batalha contra o crime, o garoto-formiga precisa lidar com as repercussões da fama. Enquanto enfrenta um novo e perigoso vilão, o menino irá fazer de tudo para impedir que um aluno da escola conquiste o coração de Ida. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Homem de Família, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um corretor de investimentos, a quem foi oferecida a oportunidade de ver como seria sua vida paralela, acorda e descobre que seu carro esportivo e a namorada se tornaram uma minivan e sua esposa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Amor de Filhote, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um bandido chamado Mercer está envolvido em uma rinha ilegal de cães. O seu pastor alemão é mordido enquanto luta e consegue fugir. A jovem Paige Crowley encontra o cachorro e o leva para casa escondido de seu pai Travis e o batiza como Duke. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Você Acredita?, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um pastor é questionado por um morador de rua sobre sua crença em Deus, e passa a usar essa pergunta com seus fiéis também. A partir daí, doze histórias diferentes se cruzam, cada uma com sua provação sobre até onde vai a fé em Deus. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Vida em Espera, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O colapso nervoso de um homem faz com que ele deixe a esposa e viva no sótão por vários meses. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Cenas de Natureza Sexual, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Sete casais discutem relações amorosas, prostituição, adoção, poligamia, amor e sexo em uma linda tarde de sol no parque Hampstead Heath, em Londres. Para alguns deles, as coisas não estão tão boas quanto o dia. Gêneros: Drama

E o que é o diagrama salvo em um disquete que fora confiado a Issamu? Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.sub-title: RX Contra o Cavaleiro do Vento
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E03

programme.title: 1988. Uma menina oferece uma estranha droga a Manabu e acaba deixando-o internado no hospital. programme.title: 1988. A batalha de Jiraiya com o filho de Chang Kung Fu e Kanin Dragon continua. Reiha revela um misterioso poder cósmico. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Takumi Tsutsui, Megumi Sekiguchi, Takumi Hashimoto, Masaaki Hatsumi Diretor: Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura

programme.title: 1988. Toha encontra Mimura, um ex-adversário de Tetsuzan e desertor dos ninjas Kaminin. Mimura está sendo perseguido pelo clã pois não quer cometer os crimes que os Kaminin praticam. programme.title: 1988. A família Yamashi vai a um festival na terra onde nasceu a lenda de Jiraiya, mas logo são atacados por Gyuma, um habilidoso ninja cambojano. programme.title: 1988. Varias explosões acontecem em diversas fábricas e indústrias do Japão. Bakunin Homem Míssil é acusado de ser o responsável, mas Tetsuzan sabe que não pode ser ele. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Takumi Tsutsui, Megumi Sekiguchi, Takumi Hashimoto, Masaaki Hatsumi Diretor: Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura, Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura
programme.desc: Jiraya - O incrível Ninja - T01E14

programme.title: 1988. O ninja turco Haburamu encontra uma espada macabra em catacumbas na Turquia. Sem querer, ressuscita a ninja bruxa Luana que quer transformar o mundo em um mar de sangue. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Takumi Tsutsui, Megumi Sekiguchi, Takumi Hashimoto, Masaaki Hatsumi Diretor: Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura
programme.sub-title: 15 - A Maldição Lendária Manin Luana (Manin Shirubia) Rōnin Haburamu
programme.desc: Jiraya - O incrível Ninja - T01E15

programme.title: 1988. A Unidade de Ninjas Especiais da Família dos Feiticeiros é criada para derrotar Jiraiya definitivamente. Eles são FIre, Water, Tree, Land e Stormin. Ao mesmo tempo Toha recebe do Dr. Smith uma versão mais moderna de seu carro, o Black Storm. programme.title: 1988. Toha e Manabu fazem uma viagem em busca da diabólica armadura Satã que corrompe o espírito do usuário. Tetsuzan teme que algum mal possa estar próximo. programme.title: 1988. A batalha contra Satã se torna mais intensa. Tetsuzan aparece para ajudar Jiraiya e Agnes. Dokusai é traído por Satã e também jura vingança. programme.title: 1985. Crianas de uma vila local encontram um filhote de monstro. MacGaren e sua quadrilha, disfarçados, levam o monstrinho. Jaspion ajuda as crianças a recuperarem o filhote, mas MacGaren contra ataca. programme.title: 1985. Quatro cientistas estão no caminho da cidade tecnológica de Tsukuba em uma lancha pelo rio. Quando voltam estão com os cabelos brancos, além disso começam a agir violentamente. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo

programme.title: 1985. A profecia da Bíblia Galáctica cita a existência de um empréstimo passado dourado que ajudou um herói a derrotar Satan Goss. Macgaren escraviza o povo de uma aldeia em busca do pássaro. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo

programme.title: 1997. O avô de Stan está fazendo 102 e quer se matar, mas como não pode fazer isso sozinho, pede a ajuda de Stan. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T01E06

programme.title: 1997. Kenny é esmagado pela Estação Espacial Mir e se transforma em um zumbi que dá início a uma enorme epidemia. Entretanto, o doutor diagnostica todos como se fosse apenas um caso de conjutivite. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T01E07

programme.title: 1997. Os rapazes encontram um objeto misterioso em uma escavação escolar e saem no jornal. Barbra Streisand aparece na cidade buscando o tal objeto, pois é a última peça necessária para que ela possa se transformar em um monstro japonês gigante. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T01E12

programme.title: 1998. Uma onda de crimes toma conta de South Park, galinhas são molestadas e Barbrady pede demissão. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T02E03

programme.title: 1998. O Chef está sendo processado por tentar obter os direitos autorais de uma canção que escreveu há 20 anos atrás. Para ajudá-lo nesta batalha, os garotos organizam um concerto para arrecadar dinheiro. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T02E14

programme.title: 1999. Vários habitantes de South Park estão ficando cada vez mais furiosos, e sem alguma razão aparente. Randy é o principal responsável para descobrir uma solução para este problema. Enquanto isso, Kyle tenta "conseguir uma ereção". Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E02

programme.title: 1999. Cartman, Kyle e Stan enganam Tweek e Craig para que eles lutem um contra o outro. Enquanto isso, um dos professores está sendo atormentado por uma recordação de sua falecida namorada, e Kenny conquista um homem rico na aula de cozinha. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E04

programme.title: 1999. A mãe de Cartman dá um presente para ajudá-lo a ganhar o concurso de soletrar. Trata-se de um "macaco da fonética". Neste concurso, os rapazes conhecem Marc e Rebecca, dois irmãos que não vão para a escola, pois estudam em suas casas. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E13

programme.title: 2000. Cartman acha que é muito maduro para sair com Stan, Kyle e Kenny, e decide buscar novos amigos na internet, mas termina se metendo em vários problemas com pedófilos. Enquanto isso, Kenny tenta evitar que seus pais tenham outro filho. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.sub-title: Cartman entra para a ASNAMB (Associação De Sósias Norte-Americanos Do Marlon Brando)
programme.desc: South Park - T04E06

programme.title: 2001. Cartman encontra um carregamento cheio de fetos abortados após o tombamento de um caminhão em um barranco. Em seguida, ele decide entrar para um novo negócio supostamente lucrativo: a venda de fetos mortos. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T05E13

programme.title: 2002. Os rapazes ganham muitos doces em um concurso, mas para conseguir o grande prêmio, precisam do cupom vencedor, que é aquele que ficou com Kenny antes de morrer. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T06E12

programme.title: 2005. Kenny consegue o último videogame portátil da cidade. Porém, ele morre ao chegar no nível 60 do jogo, e vai ao céu, onde fica sabendo que Deus o matou de propósito, já que precisam dele para que salve o céu de um ataque de Satanás. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T09E04

programme.title: 2008. Numa homenagem ao filme de 1981, Heavy Metal, os garotos estão tentando convencer Kenny a largar a última droga da moda que viciou rapidamente os alunos do ensino médio. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T12E03

programme.title: 2009. Kenny leva sua namorada ao show dos Jonas Brothers, mas com segundas intenções. No entanto, durante o show, são distribuídos a todos anéis de pureza, levando os sonhos de Kenny por água abaixo. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Jhon Hansen, Matt Stone, Mickey Ramos, Milan Agnone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T13E01

programme.title: 2010. Cartman quer se tornar um corredor da NASCAR, mas ele acha que não tem condições porque não é "pobre e suficientemente estúpido" para alcançar seus sonhos. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T14E08

programme.title: 2010. A verdadeira identidade de Mysterion finalmente é revelada. Enquanto isso, Guaxinim, desprezado por seus amigos super-heróis, está com sede de vingança. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Adrien Beard, April Stewart, Eric Stough, Jessica Makinson, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Sebastian Yu, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T14E12

programme.title: 2010. Guaxinim e amigos se encontram à mercê de Cartman, que agora tem o senhor das trevas, Cthulhu, trabalhando para ele. Kenny luta contra a maldição dos seus superpoderes através do seu alter ego, Mysterion. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Adrien Beard, April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T14E13

programme.title: 2012. É hora de Butters começar uma jornada onde seguirá os passos de seus ancestrais Havaianos. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T16E11

programme.title: 2013. A temporada de compras de fim de ano começa e os garotos tentam descobrir como enfrentar a correria no shopping para conseguir bons preços em games. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T17E07

programme.title: 2013. A guerra dos consoles aumenta enquanto grupos de compradores se apertam no shopping em antecipação à Black Friday. Enquanto isso, Cartman busca vingança contra a Princesa Kenny. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.sub-title: Um fogo que não se apaga
programme.desc: South Park - T17E08

programme.title: 2013. As crianças de South Park estão interpretando os personagens de Game of Thrones. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T17E09

programme.title: 2015. Neste novo episódio de South Park, Kenny está tentando sair do ciclo da pobreza e, para isso, arruma um novo emprego: ele começa a trabalhar na City Wok. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt, Garefino, Anne, Agnone Ii, Frank C., Makinson, Jessica, Parker, Trey, Stone Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T19E03

programme.title: 2018. Os cidadãos de South Park estão em perigo e as crianças descobrem que apenas Al Gore pode ajudá-los. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T22E06

programme.title: 1997. Cartman conta para seus amigos sobre o seu sonho em que apareciam uns alienígenas que o abduzem e lhe introduzem uma sonda anal. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T06E03

programme.title: 2002. Stan fuma uns cigarros de maconha que uns rapazes mais velhos deixaram e, pela noite, aparece um homem de 32 anos perdido e drogado que diz ser o Stan do futuro. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Adrien Beard, Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T06E16

programme.title: 2003. Um novo aluno mórmon se muda à South Park, mas não se dá bem com ninguém. Os rapazes querem que Stan comece uma briga com ele, mas na verdade, ele acaba se tornando seu amigo. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Adrien Beard, Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T07E12

programme.title: 2003. Wendy termina o seu relacionamento com Stan, e para ajudá-lo, os meninos o levam a um restaurante famoso por suas asas de frango e suas belas garçonetes. Mas o plano não funciona e Stan se une a um grupo de góticos. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Nico Agnone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T07E14

programme.title: 2004. Os protetores dos animais se manifestam contra o uso de uma vaca como mascote da escola, e os estudantes se veem forçados a buscarem uma nova mascote, o que gera um conflito entre Cartman e Kyle, já que ambos tem ideias diferetes. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E08

programme.title: 2004. Stan se encontra com alguns lindos animaizinhos do bosque, que pedem para ele alguns favores inocentes. Após ajudar todos eles, Stan descobre que na verdade eles tem um plano para trazer o anticristo para o mundo. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E14

programme.title: 2005. Stan e Cartman acabam inundando um dos vilarejos próximos a South Park. Como resultado, a cidade de South Park é declarada em estado de emergência, já que todos acham que isso é obra do aquecimento global. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.sub-title: Dois dias antes de depois de amanhã
programme.desc: South Park - T09E08

programme.title: 2005. Stan estava buscando algo "divertido e grátis" para passar o tempo e aceita fazer um teste de personalidade oferecido por uns cientologistas e descobre que o seu "nível de alma" é surpreendentemente alto. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T09E12

programme.title: 2006. Agora Stan é o novo treinador de um time de hockey infantil e tenta fazer com que eles ganhem tudo. Enquanto isso, seu pai precisa lidar com a recordação do terrível desempenho de Stan em uma partida há alguns anos atrás. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T10E14

programme.title: 2007. Stan quer saber a verdadeira razão para as crianças decorarem os ovos de Páscoa e o que ovos e coelhos tem a ver com a morte de Jesus. Para chegar à verdade, Kyle e Stan se envolvem com uma sociedade bizarra que guarda um segredo lendário. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T11E05

programme.title: 2007. Stan e Kyle se tornam obcecados pelo Guitar Hero, chegando ao ponto de baterem recordes. Depois de um tempo Stan pensa que poderia ir mais longe na carreira com um parceiro diferente. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T11E13

programme.title: 2008. Um dia, os moradores de South Park acordam e descobrem que estão sem Internet. Randy descobre que ainda há Internet na Califórnia e junto com a sua família, eles se dirigem para o Oeste do país. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Ema Parker, Eric Stough, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T12E06

programme.title: 2009. Enquanto a cidade está ocupada apontando culpados pela crise econômica, Randy apresenta uma solução para as dificuldades financeiras. Com a ajuda de todos os moradores, a cidade passa a viver sem qualquer economia. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T13E03

programme.title: 2009. Chegou a hora da corrida de pinhos em South Park e Stan e Randy estão trabalhando duro para construir o melhor carro. Enquanto trabalha no carro de corrida, Randy adquire um componente muito especial para garantir o primeiro lugar de Stan. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T13E06

programme.title: 2009. Stan se mobiliza para impedir que os japoneses matem todas as baleias e os golfinhos do mundo. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T13E11

programme.title: 2010. Os meninos fazem um perfil de Stan no Facebook contra a sua vontade. Stan acaba ficando de saco cheio com os pedidos de amizade e tenta deletar seu perfil, mas ele acaba sendo sugado para dentro do mundo virtual do Facebook. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T14E04

programme.title: 2010. Stan sofre de transtorno de acúmulo de bugigangas e, juntamente, com o Sr. Mackey, aceita ser tratado por especialistas. Stan entra no mundo dos sonhos Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker, Vernon Chatman Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T14E10

programme.title: 2010. A vida de Stan está um verdadeiro desastre, tanto em casa quanto na escola. Enquanto isso, a obsessão de Randy com a comida está mudando tudo, e inclusive faz com que Sharon descubra novos interesses. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T14E14

programme.title: 2011. Ao completar 10 anos de idade, a visão do mundo de Stan muda e também suas amizades. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T15E07

programme.title: 2011. Stan está tentando fazer com que sua vida volte ao normal e acaba descobrindo algo terrível. Enquanto isso, Cartman faz o melhor hambúrguer da cidade. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T15E08

programme.title: 2012. Cartman lança seu próprio canal de vendas de joias na televisão. Isso gera um negócio bastante lucrativo, já que as joias, na verdade, são falsas. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T16E02

programme.title: 2012. Butters é vítima de um bullying improvável. Agora ele quer conscientizar os demais alunos sobre os perigos do bullying e, para isso, ele faz um grande vídeo de dança. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T16E05

programme.title: 2012. O mundo está abalado pela recente notícia do uso de drogas por um ícone amado, e todos estão se sentindo perdidos e traídos. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T16E13

programme.title: 2013. Os garotos tentam impedir que seus pais machuquem uns aos outros usando como distração o jogo Minecraft. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T17E02
